description_long: This doll features a large, angular head with prominent, pointed black hair and oversized green and black eyes set in a stern expression. The face is pale with a small, simple mouth and no visible nose, giving it a stylized cartoon appearance. The body is small and cylindrical, dressed in a bright green dress with a black horizontal stripe and matching green and black shoes. The arms are short and stubby, colored in a pale tone similar to the face, and the legs are white with black detailing at the feet. The overall design is minimalist, with bold, flat colors and sharp geometric shapes. The doll's visual style is reminiscent of animated characters from late 1990s American cartoons.
description: A stylized doll with a large angular head, pointed black hair, and oversized green eyes, wearing a green dress with black stripes and matching shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's stern face, large green eyes, and green dress with black stripe.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pointed black hair and the slim profile of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, angular black hair and the back of the green dress.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the head and body, with one large eye partially visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Bright green sleeveless dress with a single black horizontal stripe, paired with white and black shoes; the style is cartoonish and reminiscent of late 1990s American animated characters.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly angled outward and legs straight; the head is facing forward and the body is static.
attribute_facial_expression: Frowning expression with large, wide-open eyes, downward-angled eyebrows, and a small, straight mouth conveying a stern or determined look.
attribute_hair_style: Short, angular black hair with exaggerated pointed sides, styled in a geometric, cartoonish fashion.
